.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-control-item.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-path-label.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.graph-controls.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: oklch(0.838401 0.172222 83.5612 / 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-folder-title-content::before.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.search-result-file-matched-text.background: rgb(212, 69, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf.mod-active.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-tab-header-container.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--base-font-face:
-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Helvetica Neue", Arial,
    "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "Hiragino Sans", "メイリオ", Meiryo, sans-serif
body.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: oklch(0.838401 0.172222 83.5612 / 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].border-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgb(221, 119, 34), rgb(136, 17, 0), rgb(238, 85, 34), rgb(204, 17, 34)) 1 / 0 0 5px / 0 stretch

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].border-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgb(255, 136, 34), rgb(153, 34, 34), rgb(34, 34, 34)) 1 / 0px 0 3px / 0 stretch

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].background: rgb(218, 98, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].background: rgb(255, 106, 106) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].background: rgb(255, 106, 106) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].background: rgb(255, 106, 106) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

h6[data-heading=\"This is a heading 6\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
h6[data-heading=\"This is a heading 6\"].font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(255, 190, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(233, 179, 95) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(48, 48, 48) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: color(srgb 0.284706 0.233725 0.0847059) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
